titleStmt.title: SII 20.45: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 45. (B.K. Nos. 65 and 65A of 1937-38.) RŪGI, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone standing close to the front wall of the Hanūmān temple.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 99[3], Virōdhakrit, Ashādha, ba. 11, Sunday, Dakshiṇāyanasaṁkranti corresponding to A.D. 1071, June 26.

It records a gift of income from certain taxes for worship, offerings and burning perpetual lamp before God Nagarēśvaradēva by Perggaḍe Kannapayya, Sēnabōva Māḷapayya-nāyaka and the Karaṇa when Mahāmanḍalēśvara Pāyiyarasa was governing Tardavāḍi-1000 division.

It contains the renewal of the gift of oil to God Kēdāradēva by Telliga Gōṁkayya and others made in the year Śaka 967, Pārthiva, Pushya, śu. 7, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The details of this date are irregular. The tithi corresponded to A.D. 1045, December 18, Wednesday and the saṁkrānti occurred on December 23. See No. 44 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Nine lines in the beginning are worn out.

manaḷida pātaka vagganittu pu
ṇya Arasu ge mumu
tigaṇamu mahādharmmamanā
daradiṁ rakṣise puṇyaṁ dorekoḷgumu
pēkṣe geydarappaḍe dōśaṁ ©
© sakavarṣa 992neya virōdhakṛtsaṁvatsarada Ā
śāḍa ba 11 Ādityavāra dakṣiṇāyana saṁkrāṁti
yaṁdu śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvara kaṭṭidalagu
śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ pāyiyarasar
tarddavāḍisāsiramumanāḷdarasugeyyuttami
re Avara parggaḍe kannapayyaṁ sēnabōvaṁ māḷapayyanā
yakapramukha karaṇaṁgaḷu binnapaṁ geydu Āneya
rūvigeya śrīmannagarēśvaradēvara nivēdyakaṁ na
ndādīvigegaṁ Alliya bairivāyada paṟi
ṟeleverasu suṁkamaṁ biṭṭar gātrigaruṁ
pannavaṇamuṁ koṭṭeleya hēṟu Aṁtu hēṟige
naḍevele 200 Alliya manneya voladoḷa
ge Aruvaṇadiṟuva Arjjunēśvaraṁ basadiyaṁ
mūḍiṁ biṭṭa gadyāṇa 2 perjjuṁkadadigeya
ndavakōlamumakṣōṇiyāgi naḍeva gadyāṇa
A mārggade pannāyadiṁdakṣōṇiyāgi naḍeva
gadyā 1 Iṁtinitumaṁ perggaḍe karaṇaṁgaḷ
suṁkaverggaḍegaḷuṁ Ūroḍeya pramukha mahā
janamuṁ rakṣisuvar Idaṁ rakṣisidavargganaṁ
tapuṇyaṁ Idanaḷidavargge vāraṇāsiyoḷ
vuṁ brāhmaṇarumanaḷida dōṣaṁ sārgguṁ © © .
munnaṁ sakavarṣa 967 neya pārttiva saṁvatsara
da puṣya suddha 7 Ādityavāra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁ
tiyaṁdu telligagoṁkayyaṁ cayyaṁ caṭṭayyaṁ kēta
yyaṁ mallayya puliyammaṁ Āycayya sōvayya bi
ntivarmodalāgi telligarayvattokkalellamiḷdalliya kēdāradēva
ra nandādīvigege ghāṇadoḷsoḷasige yeṇṇeyanellā kālakkaṁ
du biṭṭar Ā yeṇneyanetti taṁdu naṁdādīvigeya
ḷagaivamāṇiya ka ḷakavarṣakkaṁ ghāṇavoṁdu pāga
maṁ kuḍuvar Intinitumaṁ naḍasalolladavar kotthaḷige
ṟage vāraṇāsiyoḷkavileyuṁ brāhmaṇaruma
kondadōṣaṁ sārgguṁ naḍasidavargganaṁtamappa puṇyamu
Digital edition of SII 20.45 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
